name: Configuration Docs Overhaul

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Configuration Docs Overhaul is complete and correct

scope:
Configuration docs overhaul per spec .wolfcastle/docs/specs/2026-03-22T06-00Z-config-docs-overhaul.md

Split docs/humans/configuration.md into four pages:
1. docs/humans/config-quickstart.md — gets users from init to working customization fast; covers model change, custom stage, prompt override, task class example
2. docs/humans/configuration.md (rewritten) — how-it-works: three-tier directory structure, merge semantics, common customizations, wolfcastle config commands
3. docs/humans/config-reference.md — every config field by section (identity, daemon, pipeline, models, retries, failure, git, overlap, archive, task_classes, validation_commands), with type/default/description/example
4. docs/humans/task-classes.md — dedicated task classes page: what classes are, using --class flag with fallback behavior, full tables of built-in language/framework/discipline classes, custom class creation, overriding built-ins, the universal prompt

Cross-references: quickstart <-> guide <-> reference <-> task-classes, CLI command pages, README.

Deep-linking pass: review every page in docs/humans/ and README for config references that should now link to specific sections in the new pages (how-it-works.md, audits.md, failure-and-recovery.md, collaboration.md, CLI pages, README Configuration section).

See spec for full details.
success_criteria: All four config documentation pages exist and contain the content specified in the overhaul spec: config-quickstart.md, configuration.md (rewritten), config-reference.md, task-classes.md
Cross-references are wired between all four new pages (quickstart <-> guide <-> reference <-> task-classes)
Deep-linking pass complete: all existing docs in docs/humans/, CLI pages, and README updated with links to specific sections in the new config pages

breadcrumbs.text: Created 2 children: write-config-pages (orchestrator, runs first), deep-linking-pass (leaf, runs second). write-config-pages will decompose into 4 leaves, one per doc page. deep-linking-pass runs after all pages exist so it can wire cross-references into existing docs. Ordering: pages must be authored before deep-linking can reference their section anchors.

escalations.description: cli.md line 91 links to configuration.md#identity but configuration.md has no Identity heading; the anchor exists in config-reference.md#identity instead. Pre-dates this node's work.
